aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. The website lacks structured data and detailed FAQ content, which are crucial for AI search visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC services like AC installation and repair.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: Missing Service schema for detailed service listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC emergency services and detailed repair guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications and expertise through Authority schema and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the HVAC authority AI assistants trust.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ content and structured data, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; act now to stay ahead.
